title: Spare Parts (disambiguation)
content:
Two unrelated stories entitled "'''Spare Parts'''" have been written:

*"'''[[Spare Parts (short story)|Spare Parts]]'''," a short story written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] included in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11]] and on the [[Fiction]] section of the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] website
*"'''[[Spare Parts (comic story)|Spare Parts]],'''" a four-page comic written by [[Mark Evanier]] and [[Sergio Aragonés]] included in [[Star Wars Tales 4|''Star Wars Tales'' 4]]

{{Disambig}}
